02 · About Me

Turning data into
decisions

I'm a Data Analyst based in Hyderabad with hands-on industry experience at Asian Technology Hub, where I built analytics solutions that directly impacted business outcomes — reducing reporting time by 40% and improving data accuracy by 25%.

I specialise in EDA, statistical analysis, feature engineering, RFM segmentation, and A/B testing — translating complex datasets into clear, actionable insights for cross-functional stakeholders.

Certified in Python and SQL by HackerRank, and Data Analytics by Cisco & HP Foundation. Completing B.Tech in Information Technology from JNTUK (2021–2025).

03 · Experience

Where I've worked

Data Analyst Intern
Asian Technology Hub  ·  Hyderabad, India
Jul 2025 – Mar 2026
  • Performed EDA on large structured datasets using Python (Pandas, NumPy) and SQL, extracting actionable insights that supported data-driven decision-making across multiple business units.
  • Designed and deployed interactive Power BI dashboards with DAX and KPIs for real-time monitoring — reduced manual reporting time by 40% and improved stakeholder visibility into key business metrics.
  • Executed end-to-end ETL validation and data quality checks — improved reporting accuracy by 25% and minimised downstream data errors across production pipelines.
  • Optimised SQL queries using CTEs, subqueries, joins, and window functions; automated Python workflows — cut manual effort by 30% and improved operational efficiency.
  • Translated complex analytical findings into clear, visual business recommendations for cross-functional stakeholders, enabling faster and more confident decision-making.
04 · Projects

Things I've built

01
📉
Retail Lending Risk Intelligence
ProblemIdentify key default predictors in a retail lending portfolio to reduce financial risk exposure.
ApproachEngineered borrower risk features — EMI-to-Income Ratio, Credit Score Buckets, Risk Flag — using Python + MySQL via SQLAlchemy.
InsightHigh EMI stress (ratio > 0.5) identified as strongest default predictor; high-risk customer segments flagged.
Outcome4-panel BI dashboard deployed for stakeholder reporting, enabling proactive risk decisions.
PythonPandasNumPySQLSQLAlchemyMySQLMatplotlib
View Code on GitHub
02
🛒
GMart Retail Sales Analytics
ProblemUnderstand revenue drivers and customer behavior across 50,000+ retail transactions to improve sales strategy.
ApproachStore-wise, category-wise, and city-wise revenue breakdowns + Pareto analysis with Python and Power BI.
InsightTop 20% customers drive majority of revenue; discount impact and seasonal trends identified.
Outcome6-panel dashboard covering monthly trends, discount impact, and payment modes for leadership decisions.
PythonPandasPower BISQLMySQLPareto Analysis

👥
Customer Intelligence & Revenue Optimization
ProblemSegment e-commerce customers to improve retention, reduce churn, and identify high-value revenue tiers.
ApproachBuilt RFM segmentation model — Premium, Regular, Low-Value tiers — using Python and MySQL EDA.
InsightTop 20% customers drive 80%+ revenue; Fashion identified as highest return-rate segment.
OutcomeDelivered upselling and retention strategies to improve Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) per segment.

AeroPulse — Airline Operations & Revenue Intelligence
ProblemIdentify revenue leakage, operational inefficiencies, and delay patterns across airline flight transactions.
ApproachEngineered Load Factor, Route, Delay Category, Day Type features; integrated with MySQL via SQLAlchemy.
InsightIdentified top delay routes and low-load flights below 60% seat capacity, plus highest revenue-generating routes.
Outcome5-panel operations dashboard enabling revenue recovery and operational improvements.
